lex.skillAttestation/defs: {:main {:type "record", :key "tid", :record {:type "object", :required ["learnerDid" "domain" "demonstrationCid" "timestamp"], :properties {:learnerDid {:type "string", :description "learner DID"}, :domain {:type "string", :enum ["literacy" "numeracy" "civics" "agriculture" "construction" "energy" "pharmaceuticals" "other"], :description "skill domain"}, :demonstrationCid {:type "string", :description "IPFS CIDv1 of replayable skill demo artifact (code, artifact photo, project, etc.)"}, :reviewerDid {:type "string", :description "optional: Council member or mentor who attested the demonstration"}, :timestamp {:type "string", :description "ISO-8601 datetime of attestation"}, :context {:type "string", :description "free-text description of the skill domain and context"}}}}}
